the|at) (morning|afternoon|evening|night))/i,any:/^([ap]\.?\s?m\.?|midnight|noon|(in the|at) (morning|afternoon|evening|night))/i},bp={any:{am:/^a/i,pm:/^p/i,midnight:/^mi/i,noon:/^no/i,morning:/morning/i,afternoon:/afternoon/i,evening:/evening/i,night:/night/i}},wp={ordinalNumber:up({matchPattern:cp,parsePattern:fp,valueCallback:t=>parseInt(t,10)}),era:Ne({matchPatterns:lp,defaultMatchWidth:"wide",parsePatterns:dp,defaultParseWidth:"any"}),quarter:Ne({matchPatterns:hp,defaultMatchWidth:"wide",parsePatterns:gp,defaultParseWidth:"any",valueCallback:t=>t+1}),month:Ne({matchPatterns:pp,defaultMatchWidth:"wide",parsePatterns:vp,defaultParseWidth:"any"}),day:Ne({matchPatterns:yp,defaultMatchWidth:"wide",parsePatterns:_p,defaultParseWidth:"any"}),dayPeriod:Ne({matchPatterns:mp,defaultMatchWidth:"any",parsePatterns:bp,defaultParseWidth:"any"})},$l={code:"en-US",formatDistance:Ug,formatLong:Qg,formatRelative:Vg,localize:ip,match:wp,options:{weekStartsOn:0,firstWeekContainsDate:1}};function qp(t,e){const r=C(t,e?.in);return Gl(r,Gg(r))+1}function zl(t,e){const r=C(t,e?.in),n=+xe(r)-+Lg(r);return Math.round(n/Hl)+1}function vs(t,e){const r=C(t,e?.in),n=r.getFullYear(),a=Re(),i=e?.firstWeekContainsDate??e?.locale?.options?.firstWeekContainsDate??a.firstWeekContainsDate??a.locale?.options?.firstWeekContainsDate??1,s=k(e?.in||t,0);s.setFullYear(n+1,0,i),s.setHours(0,0,0,0);const o=se(s,e),f=k(e?.in||t,0);f.setFullYear(n,0,i),f.setHours(0,0,0,0);const u=se(f,e);return+r>=+o?n+1:+r>=+u?n:n-1}function Ap(t,e){const r=Re(),n=e?.firstWeekContainsDate??e?.locale?.options?.firstWeekContainsDate??r.firstWeekContainsDate??r.locale?.options?.firstWeekContainsDate??1,a=vs(t,e),i=k(e?.in||t,0);return i.setFullYear(a,0,n),i.setHours(0,0,0,0),se(i,e)}function Ql(t,e){const r=C(t,e?.in),n=+se(r,e)-+Ap(r,e);return Math.round(n/Hl)+1}function S(t,e){const r=t<0?"-":"",n=Math.abs(t).toString().padStart(e,"0");return r+n}const fe={y(t,e){const r=t.getFullYear(),n=r>0?r:1-r;return S(e==="yy"?n%100:n,e.length)},M(t,e){const r=t.getMonth();return e==="M"?String(r+1):S(r+1,2)},d(t,e){return S(t.getDate(),e.length)},a(t,e){const r=t.getHours()/12>=1?"pm":"am";switch(e){case"a":case"aa":return r.toUpperCase();case"aaa":return r;case"aaaaa":return r[0];case"aaaa":default:return r==="am"?"a.m.":"p.m."}},h(t,e){return S(t.getHours()%12||12,e.length)},H(t,e){return S(t.getHours(),e.length)},m(t,e){return S(t.getMinutes(),e.length)},s(t,e){return Mi(t,e,r){const n=Ip(t,e,r);if(console.warn(n),Op.includes(t))throw new RangeError(n)}function Ip(t,e,r){const n=t[0]==="Y"?"years":"days of the month";return`Use \`${t.toLowerCase()}\` instead of Pp=/[yYQqMLwIdDecihHKkms]o|(\w)\1*|''|'(''|[^'])+('|$)|./g,xp=/P+p+|P+|p+|''|'(''|[^'])+('|$)|./g,Mp=/^'([^]*?)'?$/,Dp=/''/g,Fp=/[a-zA-Z]/;function Ep(t,e,r){const c=l.value;(!r?.useAdditionalWeekYearTokens&&Jl(c)||!r?.useAdditionalDayOfYearTokens&&Vl(c))&&Mi(c,e,String(t));const d=Pf[c[0]];return d(o,c,a.localize,u)}).join("")}function Sp(t){const e=t.match(Mp);return e?e[1].replace(Dp,"'"):t}function Lp(t,e){return C(t,e?.in).getDate()}function Wp(t,e){const r=C(t,e?.in),n=r.getFullYear(),a=r.getMonth(),i=k(r,0);return Bp(t,e){return C(t,e?.in).getFullYear()}function Xy(t,e){return+C(t)>+C(e)}function Vy(t,e){return+C(t)<+C(e)}function Jy(t,e){return+C(t)==+C(e)}function Up(t,e){const r=Kp(e)?new e(0):k(e,0);return t=="function"&&t.prototype?.constructor===t}const $p=10;class Zl{subPriority=0;validate(e,r){return!0}}class zp extends Zl{constructor(e,r,n,a,i){super(),this.value=e,this.validateValue=r,this.setValue=n,this.priority=a,i&&(this.subPriority=i)}validate(e,r){return this.validateValue(e,this.value,r)}set(e,r,n){return E{run(e,r,n,a){const i=this.parse(e,r,n,a);return i?{setter:new zp(i.value,this.validate,this.set,this.priority,this.subPriority),rest:i.rest}:null}validate(e,r,n){return!0}}class Xp extends E{priority=140;parse(e,r,n){switch(r){case"G":case"GG":case"GGG":return n.era(e,{width:"abbreviated"})||n.era(e,{width:"narrow"});case"GGGGG":return n.era(e,{width:"narrow"});case"GGGG":default:return n.era(e,{width:"wide"})||n.era(e,{width:"abbreviated"})||n.era(e,{width:"narrow"})}}set(e,r,n){return r.era=n,e.setFullYear(n,0,1),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),e}incompatibleTokens=["R","u","t","T"]}const K={month:/^(1[0-2]|0?\d)/,date:/^(3[0-1]|[0-2]?\d)/,dayOfYear:/^(36[0-6]|3[0-5]\d|[0-2]?\d?\d)/,week:/^(5[0-3]|[0-4]?\d)/,hour23h:/^(2[0-3]|[0-1]?\d)/,hour24h:/^(2[0-4]|[0-1]?\d)/,hour11h:/^(1[0-1]|0?\d)/,hour12h:/^(1[0-2]|0?\d)/,minute:/^[0-5]?\d/,second:/^[0-5]?\d/,singleDigit:/^\d/,twoDigits:/^\d{1,2}/,threeDigits:/^\d{1,3}/,fourDigits:/^\d{1,4}/,anyDigitsSigned:/^-?\d+/,singleDigitSigned:/^-?\d/,twoDigitsSigned:/^-?\d{1,2}/,threeDigitsSigned:/^-?\d{1,3}/,fourDigitsSigned:/^-?\d{1,4}/},ae={basicOptionalMinutes:/^([+-])(\d{2})(\d{2})?|Z/,basic:/^([+-])(\d{2})(\d{2})|Z/,basicOptionalSeconds:/^([+-])(\d{2})(\d{2})((\d{2}))?|Z/,extended:/^([+-])(\d{2}):(\d{2})|Z/,extendedOptionalSeconds:/^([+-])(\d{2}):(\d{2})(:(\d{2}))?|Z/};function $(t,e){return t&&{value:e(t.value),rest:t.rest}}function j(t,e){const r=e.match(t);return r?{value:parseInt(r[0],10),rest:e.slice(r[0].length)}:null}function ie(t,e){const r=e.match(t);if(!r)return null;if(r[0]==="Z")return{value:0,rest:e.slice(1)};const n=r[1]==="+"?1:-1,a=r[2]?parseInt(r[2],10):0,i=r[3]?parseInt(r[3],10):0,s=r[5]?parseInt(r[5],10):0;return{value:n*(a*hs+i*ds+s*Fg),rest:e.slice(r[0].length)}}function ed(t){return j(K.anyDigitsSigned,t)}function G(t,e){switch(t){case 1:return j(K.singleDigit,e);case 2:return j(K.twoDigits,e);case 3:return j(K.threeDigits,e);case 4:return j(K.fourDigits,e);default:return j(new RegExp("^\\d{1,"+t+"}"),e)}}function er(t,e){switch(t){case 1:return j(K.singleDigitSigned,e);case 2:return j(K.twoDigitsSigned,e);case 3:return j(K.threeDigitsSigned,e);case 4:return j(K.fourDigitsSigned,e);default:return j(new RegExp("^-?\\d{1,"+t+"}"),e)}}function ys(t){switch(t){case"morning":return 4;case"evening":return 17;case"pm":case"noon":case"afternoon":return 12;case"am":case"midnight":case"night":default:return 0}}function rd(t,e){const r=e>0,n=r?e:1-e;let a;if(n<=50)a=t||100;else{const i=n+50,s=Math.trunc(i/100)*100,o=t>=i%100;a=t+s-(o?100:0)}return r?a:1-a}function td(t){return t%400===0||t%4===0&&t%100!==0}class Vp extends E{priority=130;incompatibleTokens=["Y","R","u","w","I","i","e","c","t","T"];parse(e,r,n){const a=i=>({year:i,isTwoDigitYear:r==="yy"});switch(r){case"y":return $(G(4,e),a);case"yo":return $(n.ordinalNumber(e,{unit:"year"}),a);default:return $(G(r.length,e),a)}}validate(e,r){return r.isTwoDigitYear||r.year>0}set(e,r,n){const a=e.getFullYear();if(n.isTwoDigitYear){const s=rd(n.year,a);return e.setFullYear(s,0,1),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),e}const i=!("era"in r)||r.era===1?n.year:1-n.year;return e.setFullYear(i,0,1),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),e}}class Jp extends E{priority=130;parse(e,r,n){const a=i=>({year:i,isTwoDigitYear:r==="YY"});switch(r){case"Y":return $(G(4,e),a);case"Yo":return $(n.ordinalNumber(e,{unit:"year"}),a);default:return $(G(r.length,e),a)}}validate(e,r){return r.isTwoDigitYear||r.year>0}set(e,r,n,a){const i=vs(e,a);if(n.isTwoDigitYear){const o=rd(n.year,i);return e.setFullYear(o,0,a.firstWeekContainsDate),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),se(e,a)}const s=!("era"in r)||r.era===1?n.year:1-n.year;return e.setFullYear(s,0,a.firstWeekContainsDate),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),se(e,a)}incompatibleTokens=["y","R","u","Q","q","M","L","I","d","D","i","t","T"]}class Zp extends E{priority=130;parse(e,r){return er(r==="R"?4:r.length,e)}set(e,r,n){const a=k(e,0);return a.setFullYear(n,0,4),a.setHours(0,0,0,0),xe(a)}incompatibleTokens=["G","y","Y","u","Q","q","M","L","w","d","D","e","c","t","T"]}class ev extends E{priority=130;parse(e,r){return er(r==="u"?4:r.length,e)}set(e,r,n){return e.setFullYear(n,0,1),e.setHours(0,0,0,0),e}incompatibleTokens=["G","y","Y","R","w","I","i","e","c","t","T"]}class rv extends E{priority=120;parse(e,r,n){switch(r){case"Q":case"QQ":return G(r.length,e);case"Qo":return n.ordinalNumber(e,{unit:"quarter"});case"QQQ":return === webclient embedded.js head ===
import"./0.js";import{q as s,Q as T,R as j,v as k,o as d,P as L,w as C,T as I,x as D,y as N,S as h,U as R,C as B,c as w,V as $,B as c,i as S,A as f,d as z,W as F,X as V,Y as q,Z as H,_ as O,$ as K,a0 te}from"./06.js";import"./04.js";import"./05.js";function se(t,e){return e.split(".").reduce((a,n)=>{if(a&&typeof a=="object")return a[n]},t)}function l(t,e){let i;function a(){const g={archivePane:!0,forceMjpeg:!1,keepTimestamp:!0,exportMenuButton:!0,fastSearch:!1,alertReview:!1,bar:!0,eventsPanel:!0,showTimelinePreviews:!0},ae=["init","reInit","stop","play","setTime","getSnapshot"];function oe=t=>!t?.time||typeof t.time!="string"?t?.time:t.utc?new Date(t.time):new Date(J(t.time));class P{get state(){return this.constructor.name}init(e){return r.embedded("invalid transition from E=m.archList.find(({storage:M})=>M===e.archive?.storage);s.dispatch(c.changeArchive(o.origin,E))}}return e.mode==="live"?new ce(e.autoplay):e.mode==="archive"?new de(e.archive,e.autoplay):this}}class
